import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Move-out event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/pms/events/move-out"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Event-oriented endpoint to mark a unit as vacant.

Resets 8 fields to defaults: `pms_tenant_id`, `move_in_date`, `balance_due`, `paid_through_date`, `pms_lockout`, `pms_lock_exempt`, `pms_auction`, `pms_unrentable`. Preserves `crm_unit_id`, `name`, lock associations, access history.

Idempotent. Re-sending for an already-vacant unit returns `200` with no change.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
